## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to review content gap analysis and align on next steps for Flosum's content strategy, focusing on data backup product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented initial content gap analysis with 150+ potential assignments across multiple clusters](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Flosum team to prioritize clusters and select 2 initial articles for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Gong call recordings identified as valuable source for keyword research and content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Team discussed balancing broad vs. deep content approach and conversion potential across different content types](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Topics

### Content Gap Analysis Overview

  - [150+ potential assignments identified, focusing on data backup and related topics](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Total search volume of \~77,000 indicates significant organic traffic potential](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Content clustered into subcategories: data protection, management, compliance, governance](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Aida spent \~3 days on manual keyword research and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Keyword Research Methodology

  - [Analyzed top competitors: Own Backup, Proudly, Otisava, Gearset, Grax](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Conducted keyword gap analysis and traditional keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Focused on jobs-to-be-done, target audience pain points, and product solutions](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Incorporated broader topics like data governance, compliance, and security](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### Gong Integration for Content Ideas

  - [Girish suggested using Gong call recordings to identify common customer questions](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Team agreed this could uncover high-value, low-competition keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Drew to provide access; Matt and Saakshi can help analyze backup-related calls](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore workflow for integrating Gong data into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Discussed balancing deep vs. broad content approach](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Agreed to focus on backup initially, but experiment with adjacent topics](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Plan to use customer-centric topics (e.g., RTO, RPO) as priority content](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Will incorporate product relevance in latter portions of articles (last 15%)](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

### Content Performance Expectations

  - [Search volume is a proxy; actual traffic potential often higher due to long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Conversion rates vary by content type (e.g., definition content \~0.5%, listicles 5-15%)](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Team to monitor performance and adjust strategy based on actual results](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Existing Content Audit

  - [GrowthX to review current Flosum website content for potential updates/repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Full audit to be conducted as content production ramps up](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Flosum team to review and prioritize content clusters in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Select 2 initial articles for calibration from "Ready to Start" assignments](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [GrowthX to create drafts for selected articles before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Matt to schedule separate call with GrowthX team for additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Next strategic session scheduled for same time next week](https://fathom.video/share/zN58xzU18znuyLKfrAi9is_CoGG-ghkw?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
